name: Ruri'iro Kujaku
description: __ Appearance__[/u]    Ruri'iro Kujaku's spirit takes the form of a fully grown thin man with green and orange wings attached to his hands. He has long hair which he keeps in a single long braid. He has dark blue feathers growing over his flanks without covering his abdomen and pectorals. The top of his head is covered in bandages and there's what appears to be an orange crest on it.     __ Synopsis__[/u]    Ruri'iro Kujaku is first seen when he, along with the rest of the Zanpakutō spirits, appear before the Shinigami that have gathered at Sōkyoku Hill. He is later seen along with Senbonzakura and Hōzukimaru looking at Sōkyoku Hill from some kind of fortress. After a few failed attempts at interacting with Senbonzakura, he states that he wants to kill Yumichika for calling him by a hated nickname, which is "Fuji Kujaku."
